name: Dr. Priya Sharma
about: Dr. Priya Sharma is a highly experienced general physician with over 8 years of practice. She specialises in preventive care, chronic disease management, and patient wellness.
education: MBBS, MD – General Medicine, AIIMS Delhi

name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
about: Dr. Arjun Mehta is a board-certified dermatologist with extensive experience treating skin conditions and performing cosmetic procedures.

name: Dr. Sunita Rao
about: Dr. Sunita Rao is a compassionate pediatrician dedicated to comprehensive care for children from newborns to adolescents.

name: Dr. Vikram Nair
about: Dr. Vikram Nair is an orthopedic surgeon specialising in joint replacement, sports injuries, and spine disorders.

name: Dr. Kavitha Iyer
about: Dr. Kavitha Iyer provides comprehensive women's health care including prenatal care, fertility treatments, and routine gynaecological checkups.
education: MBBS, MS – OBG, Madras Medical College

name: Dr. Ramesh Pillai
about: Dr. Ramesh Pillai is a senior cardiologist with 18 years of experience treating heart diseases and managing complex cardiac cases.

name: Dr. Ananya Singh
about: Dr. Ananya Singh specialises in diagnosing and treating neurological disorders including epilepsy, migraines, and neurodegenerative diseases.

name: Dr. Suresh Kumar
about: Dr. Suresh Kumar offers a full range of dental services from routine checkups to complex restorations and cosmetic dentistry.
education: BDS, MDS – Conservative Dentistry, SRM Dental College
